loop1.title: Events KPI Strip
loop1.note: Showing panel-level event aggregates for the last 7 days. Some panel members (GIC-01-N9-Solar Incomer-1, GIC-02-N1-Solar Incomer-2, GIC-15-N10-PCC-01 (Transformer-01), GIC-15-N11-PCC-01 (Transformer-02), GIC-02-N6-UPS-05 CL:600KVA, GIC-02-N7-UPS-06 CL:600KVA) have no data and are excluded from the rollup.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Per-panel event counts and detailed root-cause metrics are not directly measured by the panel aggregate; the AI narrative is generated from available voltage/current deviation and unbalance columns.

loop1.title: Event Timeline at {period}
loop1.note: Panel members GIC-01-N9-Solar Incomer-1, GIC-02-N1-Solar Incomer-2, GIC-15-N10-PCC-01 (Transformer-01), GIC-15-N11-PCC-01 (Transformer-02), and GIC-02-N7-UPS-06 CL:600KVA are dark (has_data=N) and will render honest-blanks for their event slots.

loop1.title: Current Distribution at {period}
loop1.note: Showing current draw for 6 active feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark (no live data) and will render as blank spokes.

loop1.title: Other Panels Event at {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-panel event counts and voltage/current metrics for fed feeders; supply-side members (Solar Incomers, Transformers) are dark and honest-blank as they have no data.
